meta.title: Pokemon Master Index (AI-Ready)
meta.description: Master index for all Pokémon species in the project. Includes progression tiers, evolution chain analysis, rarity, special classifications, and AI-friendly trainer tags.

ai_assistant_directive.text: Use this file when generating trainer parties, encounter tables, evolution-aware rosters, loot tables, rarity pools, biome ecosystems, progression gating, and boss-tier selections.
